*�����������������)The sickEngine component is requried if you need to connect to more than one SICK LIDAR sensor within the same project. It will load a SICK TOP inside its own Engine COMP so that it runs in a separate process.

If you only have one sensor, than it is recommended to just use the SICK TOP directly.
